introSection: Ladybird Loop is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer SBF Visa Group currently located at Emerald Park in Ashbourne, County Meath, Ireland. It opened to the public on 1 August 2018, although the official ribbon cutting ceremony did not occur until the following day.

fullText:
Ladybird Loop is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer SBF Visa Group currently located at Emerald Park in Ashbourne, County Meath, Ireland. It opened to the public on 1 August 2018, although the official ribbon cutting ceremony did not occur until the following day.

Figure-eight layout. Green track, brown supports.

Each row sits facing back-to-back.




 * Ladybird Loop on the park's website
